title: trifolium longipes subsp. pedunculatum
intro: Trifolium longipes subsp. pedunculatum, also known as the longstalk clover, is a subspecies of perennial herbaceous plant in the pea family Fabaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Trifolium longipes subsp. pedunculatum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are used to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
